reasoning_summary: Original query 'Ford debt risk' was too broad. Rewrite targets the two identified coverage gaps: (1) 2025 management explanation sourced from MD&A sections where executives discuss debt strategy and risk factors, and (2) liquidity evidence sourced from Liquidity and Capital Resources disclosures, cash flow statements, and credit facility footnotes. Years 2023 and 2025 are explicitly scoped to anchor retrieval to the required filing periods.
rewritten_query: Ford Motor Company 10-K and 10-Q SEC filings 2023 2025 management discussion analysis liquidity capital resources debt obligations credit facilities cash flow adequacy going concern
target_sections: Notes to Financial Statements – Long-Term Debt
Notes to Financial Statements – Credit Facilities
